description: Late blight is a highly destructive disease caused by the oomycete Phytophthora infestans. It thrives in cool, moist conditions and can rapidly destroy entire tomato fields if left unchecked.
symptoms: Irregular, water-soaked, dark spots on leaves
Spots expand rapidly, turning brown or black
White fungal growth on the underside of leaves in humid weather
Dark, greasy lesions on stems and firm, dark brown patches on fruit
treatment: Spray Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5 g/L water or Chlorothalonil 75 WP @ 2 g/L
If severe, use systemic fungicides like Metalaxyl 8% + Mancozeb 64% WP @ 2.5 g/L
treatmentHi: मैनकोजेब 75 WP @ 2.5 ग्राम/लीटर या क्लोरोथेलोनिल 75 WP @ 2 ग्राम/लीटर का छिड़काव करें
गंभीर होने पर सिस्टमिक फफूंदनाशक जैसे मेटलैक्सिल 8% + मैनकोजेब 64% WP @ 2.5 ग्राम/लीटर का प्रयोग करें
संक्रमित फसल के अवशेषों को तुरंत नष्ट करें
preventionTip: Plant resistant varieties and maintain wide spacing for good air circulation.

description: Early blight is a fungal disease that primarily affects older leaves, causing them to yellow and drop prematurely. It thrives in warm, humid weather and often occurs when plants are under stress.
symptoms: Brown to black spots on older (lower) leaves
Dark, sunken lesions with concentric rings on the stem end of fruits
treatment: Spray Copper Oxychloride 50 WP @ 2.5 g/L water
Alternatively, use Azoxystrobin 23 SC @ 1 mL/L water
Remove infected lower leaves to slow the spread
Ensure proper fertilization to reduce plant stress
treatmentHi: कॉपर ऑक्सीक्लोराइड 50 WP @ 2.5 ग्राम/लीटर पानी का छिड़काव करें
वैकल्पिक रूप से, एज़ोक्सिस्ट्रोबिन 23 SC @ 1 मि.ली./लीटर पानी का उपयोग करें
फैलने से रोकने के लिए निचली संक्रमित पत्तियों को हटा दें
पौधों के तनाव को कम करने के लिए उचित उर्वरक सुनिश्चित करें
preventionTip: Practice crop rotation with non-solanaceous crops (avoid potato, eggplant).

scientificName: Tomato leaf curl New Delhi virus (ToLCNDV)
description: Tomato leaf curl disease is caused by a begomovirus transmitted by whiteflies. It severely affects plant growth and fruit yield, especially in tropical and subtropical regions.
symptoms: Upward curling and crinkling of leaves
Stunted plant growth and shortened internodes
Fruit set is drastically reduced or absent
treatment: The virus cannot be cured; vector control is essential
Spray Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.5 mL/L or Thiamethoxam 25 WG @ 0.5 g/L to control whiteflies
Uproot and burn infected plants immediately
Use yellow sticky traps to monitor and trap whiteflies
treatmentHi: वायरस का इलाज नहीं किया जा सकता; रोग-वाहक (सफेद मक्खी) नियंत्रण आवश्यक है
सफेद मक्खी नियंत्रण के लिए इमिडाक्लोप्रिड 17.8 SL @ 0.5 मि.ली./लीटर या थियामेथोक्साम 25 WG @ 0.5 ग्राम/लीटर का छिड़काव करें
संक्रमित पौधों को तुरंत उखाड़ कर जला दें
सफेद मक्खियों की निगरानी के लिए पीले चिपचिपे जाल का प्रयोग करें
preventionTip: Use 50-mesh nylon nets in nurseries to protect seedlings from whiteflies.

description: Spider mites are tiny pests that suck sap from the undersides of tomato leaves. They multiply rapidly in hot, dry conditions, causing leaves to dry up and fall off.
symptoms: Tiny pale yellow or white speckles on leaves
Fine silk webbing on the underside of leaves or between stems
Leaves turn bronze or greyish-yellow and dry up
Stunted growth and poor fruit quality
treatment: Alternatively, use Abamectin 1.9 EC @ 1 mL/L water
Apply Neem oil (10,000 ppm) @ 2 mL/L as an organic alternative
Ensure thorough coverage on the underside of leaves
treatmentHi: स्पाइरोमेसिफेन 22.9 SC @ 1 मि.ली./लीटर पानी का छिड़काव करें
वैकल्पिक रूप से, एबामेक्टिन 1.9 EC @ 1 मि.ली./लीटर पानी का उपयोग करें
जैविक विकल्प के रूप में नीम का तेल (10,000 पीपीएम) @ 2 मि.ली./लीटर लगाएं
पत्तियों के निचले हिस्से पर अच्छी तरह से छिड़काव सुनिश्चित करें
preventionTip: Maintain adequate soil moisture and wash plants with a strong stream of water early in the infestation.
